first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest that the model's assessment was influenced by the redacted name or personal URLs. The core evaluation of strong technical skills and limited people management experience remains consistent.
